title: P0 Pipeline Correctness Fixes
description: Fix the four P0 issues identified by the research swarm that collectively prevent the nominal code-generation path from executing end-to-end: (T2) CodePhaseWorker disconnected from task dispatch, (D1) workflow gates never enforced, (D3) project_id never propagated to AgentContext, (D5) blocking thread::sleep in async executor.

steps.title: Wire CodePhaseWorker into TaskExecutor dispatch
steps.description: In hex-agent/src/adapters/secondary/task_executor.rs, the IAgentRuntimePort::execute_task implementation always delegates to SwarmSpawner::spawn(), which launches a full hex dev subprocess. CodePhaseWorker is never called. Fix: in execute_task, check if the TaskPayload role is 'hex-coder' (direct code generation) and route to CodePhaseWorker::execute(); fall back to SwarmSpawner for orchestration tasks. CodePhaseWorker needs to be constructed with the StdbInferenceAdapter and project_path. Update main.rs Daemon dispatch path accordingly.
acceptance: A task with role='hex-coder' in its payload calls CodePhaseWorker::execute()
A task without a role field falls back to SwarmSpawner

steps.title: Enforce blocking gates in execute_phases() and fix blocking sleep
steps.description: In hex-cli/src/pipeline/workflow_engine.rs: (1) execute_phases() currently records GateFailure metadata but always sets success:true. Fix: actually evaluate each phase's gate command by calling run_gate() on the gate's command string, set success:false when it fails, and return early (stop processing further phases) when blocking:true. (2) The run_feedback_loop() method uses std::thread::sleep() inside an async fn, blocking the Tokio executor for up to 60s total. Replace with tokio::time::sleep().await.
acceptance: execute_phases() returns early when a blocking gate command fails
PhaseResult.success is false when the gate command exits non-zero

steps.title: Propagate project_id into all AgentContext builders
steps.description: In hex-cli/src/pipeline/supervisor.rs, all AgentContext builder methods (build_coder_context, build_reviewer_context, build_tester_context, build_documenter_context, build_ux_context, build_fixer_context, build_context_from_yaml) hardcode project_id: None. This means ACI (ADR-2603301200) is never injected for any agent. Fix: replace all project_id: None with self.project_id.clone() in every context builder. The Supervisor struct already has a project_id: Option<String> field set via with_project_id().
acceptance: All project_id: None occurrences in context builder methods replaced with self.project_id.clone()
